name: 90 Day Fiancé: B90 Strikes Back!
overview: 90 Day Fiancé couples get a chance to clap back at haters and set the record straight. Cast members from B90—a nickname for 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days—watch clips from the show at their homes and strike back at burning tweets and social media posts.

trailers.title: Time to Clapback! | 90 Day Fiancé: B90 Strikes Back!
